title: Remotion · Brand Sizzle Reel + Kinetic Typography (10s)
summary: A 10-second brand-sizzle reel: rapid-fire stacked typography beats (3-4 word punches per beat) over a moving accent backdrop, ending with a wordmark assembly + tagline. Optimised for 9:16 / 1:1 social sets — ship the same composition with two `<Composition>` registrations, one per aspect.
prompt:
Build a 10-second Remotion brand sizzle (default 1080×1920 portrait, 30fps = 300 frames) named `BrandSizzle`. Also register a 1080×1080 square variant `BrandSizzleSquare` so the user can pick the aspect at render time.

Project under `.remotion-cache/<id>/`:
- `package.json` (react 18, remotion 4)
- `src/index.ts` (`registerRoot`)
- `src/Root.tsx` — registers BOTH compositions, sharing the same component tree but with different `width/height`:
  ```tsx
  <Composition id="BrandSizzle" component={BrandSizzle} durationInFrames={300} fps={30} width={1080} height={1920} defaultProps={{ accent: '#6cf3c0' }} />
  <Composition id="BrandSizzleSquare" component={BrandSizzle} durationInFrames={300} fps={30} width={1080} height={1080} defaultProps={{ accent: '#6cf3c0' }} />
  ```
- `src/BrandSizzle.tsx` — uses `useVideoConfig()` to scale safe-area padding so the same component fills both aspects cleanly.
- `src/atoms/StackBeat.tsx`, `KineticWord.tsx`, `Wordmark.tsx`

Visual identity: deep ink #0a0e16 canvas with a slow `linear-gradient` rotated via `transform: rotate(<frame*0.4>deg)` behind the type so the backdrop never sits still. Accent passed as prop. Off-white #f5f7fa text. Display face Inter Display 96–160px (clamped via `useVideoConfig()` ratio); secondary face Inter 22–28px; mono used only for the kicker line.

**Structure** — 5 stacked beats via `<Series>`, each ~60 frames:

1. `00–60f`: "`make · ship · share`" — three words appearing one at a time with 80ms `spring()` stagger; each word slides up 24px from below as it enters.
2. `60–120f`: "`from idea — to mp4 — in minutes`" — three short tokens cross-fade in left-to-right, each wiped through with a thin accent underline drawn left→right by tweening `width: 0 → 100%`.
3. `120–180f`: "`react. components. video.`" — single-word kinetic stack: word swaps every 20 frames, each previous word fades down 8px and out as the next slides in.
4. `180–240f`: data flex — three short numeric stats that count up with `Math.round(interpolate(...))` and tabular-nums (e.g. `60+ FPS`, `3 KB / frame`, `MIT licensed`). Stats hold for 1s.
5. `240–300f`: outro — wordmark `<Wordmark>` assembles piece-by-piece (5 spans, 60ms `spring()` stagger) centered on canvas; below, single tagline ("`Open Design`" or user-supplied) types in left-to-right; final 0.6s holds on a black-out fade-in of just the wordmark.

Non-negotiables: every entrance is spring/interpolate, no exit animations between beats (Series cuts handle them); safe area is 8% of the smaller axis; min font size 64px on headlines; no audio; the same source must render correctly for both `BrandSizzle` and `BrandSizzleSquare` (the agent picks the id when dispatching).

Dispatch:
```bash
node "$OD_BIN" media generate --project "$OD_PROJECT_ID" --surface video --model remotion-html --output brand-sizzle-9x16.mp4 --composition-dir "$COMP_REL" --composition-id BrandSizzle
```

(Use `--composition-id BrandSizzleSquare` and a different `--output` for the square variant.)
